metadata.name: Monastery Swiftspear prowess trigger and combat damage
metadata.description: Tests the full prowess interaction (CR 702.108a): p1 controls Monastery Swiftspear (1/2, haste) and casts Lightning Bolt targeting p2. The prowess triggered ability fires immediately after the spell is placed on the stack (CR 603.3), putting a second object on the stack above Lightning Bolt. When all players pass, the prowess trigger resolves first (LIFO, CR 608.1), applying a +1/+1 until-end-of-turn continuous effect that makes Swiftspear 2/3. Then all pass again and Lightning Bolt resolves, dealing 3 damage to p2 (life goes to 37). Finally, Swiftspear (which has haste, CR 702.10a) attacks in combat and deals 2 combat damage to p2 unblocked (life goes to 35). This script validates: trigger stacking order, until-end-of-turn continuous effects in the layer system, haste enabling first-turn attacks, and the combined damage total.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.108a: Prowess is a triggered ability that fires whenever the controller casts a noncreature spell. Lightning Bolt is an instant (not a creature), so it triggers prowess. CR 603.3: Triggered abilities go on the stack above the spell that caused them, in APNAP order, before any player receives priority. CR 608.1 / LIFO: The prowess trigger is on top of the stack and resolves first when all players pass. Effect::ApplyContinuousEffect creates a ContinuousEffect in the PtModify layer (layer 7c) with duration UntilEndOfTurn and filter SingleObject(Swiftspear). This makes Swiftspear 2/3 (1+1=2 power, 2+1=3 toughness). Lightning Bolt then resolves and deals 3 damage (CR 120.3) to p2, reducing p2 life from 40 to 37. In combat, Swiftspear has haste (CR 702.10a), so it can attack on the turn it came under p1's control (though it was already on battlefield in initial state). CR 508.1a: Haste allows attacking without the 'summoning sickness' restriction. Swiftspear attacks with power 2 (from prowess continuous effect still active), is unblocked, and deals 2 combat damage to p2 (CR 510.1b, 510.2), reducing p2 life from 37 to 35. Combat section uses informational stack_resolve actions — the harness does not support declare_attackers/declare_blockers/assign_damage commands, so combat damage is documented but not engine-enforced. The prowess trigger and Lightning Bolt resolution are fully harness-testable. Harness infrastructure: ReplaySession::from_script() runs on a tokio::task::spawn_blocking thread (api.rs fix applied 2026-02-25) to avoid tokio worker thread stack overflow with deep trigger resolution call chains.

script.step_note: p1 casts Lightning Bolt. Prowess trigger fires and goes on stack above the Bolt (CR 603.3). All pass — prowess resolves, Swiftspear gets +1/+1. All pass again — Lightning Bolt resolves, p2 takes 3 damage.

actions.description: Initial state: stack is empty, both players at 40 life, Swiftspear on battlefield

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 announces Lightning Bolt, pays {R}, targets p2. CR 603.3: prowess trigger from Monastery Swiftspear (casting a noncreature instant) goes on stack above Lightning Bolt before any player receives priority.

actions.description: After cast: stack has 2 objects — prowess trigger on top, Lightning Bolt below (LIFO ordering, CR 603.3)
actions.note: CR 603.3: Triggered abilities go on the stack in APNAP order above the spell that caused them. Prowess trigger is above Lightning Bolt.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass in succession — top of stack (prowess trigger) resolves. CR 608.1: LIFO — prowess trigger resolves first.

resolution.note: CR 611.2a: Until-end-of-turn effect applies to Monastery Swiftspear (layer 7c PtModify +1/+1). Swiftspear is now 2/3 for the rest of the turn.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Prowess trigger resolves. Effect::ApplyContinuousEffect is executed, pushing a ContinuousEffect with layer=PtModify, modification=ModifyBoth(+1), filter=SingleObject(Swiftspear), duration=UntilEndOfTurn.

actions.description: After prowess resolves: stack count=1 (Lightning Bolt remains), p2 still at 40 life
actions.note: Prowess trigger has resolved. Lightning Bolt is still on the stack waiting to resolve.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass in succession — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to p2. p2 life: 40 - 3 = 37.

actions.note: CR 608.2n: Instant/sorcery moves to owner's graveyard after resolving.

actions.description: After Lightning Bolt resolves: stack is empty, p2 at 37 life, Bolt in p1's graveyard
actions.note: Lightning Bolt resolved and dealt 3 damage to p2. The prowess continuous effect (+1/+1 until end of turn) is still active on Swiftspear.

script.step_note: Monastery Swiftspear (2/3 from prowess) attacks p2 using haste (CR 702.10a). p2 does not block. Swiftspear deals 2 combat damage to p2 (CR 510.1b, 510.2). p2 life: 37 - 2 = 35. NOTE: combat actions (declare_attackers, declare_blockers, assign_damage) are informational only — the harness does not execute these as engine commands.

resolution.note: CR 508.1: Beginning of combat step. CR 508.1a: Haste (CR 702.10a) allows Swiftspear to attack without summoning sickness restriction. Swiftspear is declared as attacker against p2.

actions.note: CR 508.1a: Monastery Swiftspear has haste, so it can attack. Power is 2 (printed 1 + prowess +1/+1 until end of turn continuous effect still active in PtModify layer).

resolution.note: CR 509.1: p2 declares no blockers. Monastery Swiftspear is unblocked.

actions.object: Combat damage: Monastery Swiftspear deals 2 to p2

resolution.note: CR 510.1b: Unblocked attackers assign their power as combat damage. CR 510.2: Combat damage dealt simultaneously. Swiftspear power = 2 (prowess +1/+1 still active). p2 life: 37 - 2 = 35.

actions.note: CR 510.2: Combat damage step. Swiftspear's power (2) is assigned as combat damage to p2. The prowess continuous effect (UntilEndOfTurn) is still active during combat on turn 1.
